calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF THE MINORS, SHELDON ZHOU AND SELINA ZHOU
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Petitioner Sheldon Zhou and Selina Zhou.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter Not Reported.

Petitioner Becky Cen appeared in pro per.

Petitioner was assisted by Cantonese Interpreter Winnie Chan.

Petition for change of name and gender filed October 16, 2025.

Order to show cause filed October 16, 2025.

Notice of hearing filed May 18, 2026.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After review of the filings and the testimony of Ms. Cen, the request to change the names of the minors is DENIED.

Petitioner did not make strong enough effort to find the father and notify him. Further the court does not find the Petitioner's statements in court honest.
